message:
refactor: remove unused imports in integration tests and update bead issue tracker

- Remove unused WorkloadStatEntry import from
  benchmark_evidence_bundle_integration.rs
- Remove unused BTreeMap import from
  certified_optimization_governance_integration.rs
- Prefix unused variable with underscore in
  native_addon_membrane_integration.rs scenario_multi_addon_isolation
  test to silence dead_code warning
- Update bead issue tracker status entries
